description: FR Y-9C consolidated series — the primary BHC/SLHC/IHC reporting prefix across Schedules HC, HI, HC-B, HC-R, etc.
notes: VERIFIED consolidated via Fed MDRM items 2170 and 3792 + Chicago Fed BHC Data FAQ. Corrects prior 'domestic-only' label.

description: Deposits/items in domestic offices on FR Y-9C (Schedule HC-E and related).
notes: VERIFIED via FR Y-9C user guide (BHDM6631/6636 = domestic noninterest/interest-bearing deposits).

scope: Foreign offices / Edge & Agreement subs / IBFs
description: Deposits/items in foreign offices on FR Y-9C (Schedule HC-E and related).
notes: VERIFIED via FR Y-9C user guide (BHFN6631 = foreign noninterest-bearing deposits).

description: FR Y-9C consolidated total/aggregate items (e.g. BHCT2170 total assets, BHCT0390 total investment securities); ~39 FR Y-9C items plus ~7 FR Y-11 items.
notes: VERIFIED via Fed MDRM (mnemonic BHCT = 46 items; forms FR Y-9C + FR Y-11). A limited 'total' series — BHCK remains the primary consolidated prefix.

scope: Consolidated — small item set (incl. HC-D trading detail)
description: Small FR Y-9C series; includes Schedule HC-D trading-asset detail (e.g. BHCM3531 = trading U.S. Treasury securities).
notes: VERIFIED via Fed MDRM (mnemonic BHCM = 9 items, FR Y-9C). Prior 'domestic post-2018' label not supported by the data.

description: Parent-company-only financials for large BHCs on FR Y-9LP.
notes: VERIFIED via Chicago Fed BHC Data FAQ ('BHCP is for Y9LP data') and Fed MDRM items 2170/2200. Reported on FR Y-9LP, not FR Y-9C.

description: Small FR Y-9C series of deposit items (e.g. BHCB2210 total demand deposits, BHCB2389 nontransaction savings deposits).
notes: VERIFIED via Fed MDRM (mnemonic BHCB = 7 items, FR Y-9C).

description: Schedule HC-R risk-based (standardized) capital items.
notes: VERIFIED via Fed MDRM item 3792 (BHCA3792 = total qualifying capital allowable under risk-based capital guidelines, FR Y-9C, consolidated).

scope: Not a standalone mnemonic (= BHCA + item P###)
description: NOT a 4-char mnemonic. 8-char codes like BHCAP859 (CET1 capital) and BHCAP793 (CET1 ratio) decompose as mnemonic BHCA + item P859 / P793.
notes: CLARIFIED via Fed MDRM (mnemonic 'BHCAP' = 0 items; 'BHCA' = 91). Use BHCA. Prior 'advanced approaches' label was wrong (advanced-approaches series is BHCW).

description: NOT a valid MDRM mnemonic. Earlier releases used BHCFA-prefixed items 223/224/225 for Tier 1 / Tier 2 / Total capital; those codes do not exist in MDRM.
notes: CORRECTED: the real codes are BHCA8274 (Tier 1), BHCA5311 (Tier 2), BHCA3792 (Total). Mnemonics 'BHCF'/'BHCFA' have 0 MDRM items. Row kept as an errata pointer.

description: Schedule HC-R advanced-approaches (Basel III) capital items, 2014–present.
notes: VERIFIED via Fed MDRM item 3792 (BHCW3792 = total risk-based capital, consolidated, 3/31/2014–present). The confirmed advanced-approaches series.

description: Parent-only financials for small BHCs on FR Y-9SP (semiannual).
notes: VERIFIED via Chicago Fed BHC Data FAQ ('BHSP for Y9SP data').

description: Bank-level consolidated series for FFIEC 031 filers (banks with foreign offices).
notes: VERIFIED consolidated via Fed MDRM item 2170 (RCFD2170).

description: Bank-level domestic-office series (all Call Report filers).
notes: VERIFIED via Fed MDRM item 2170 (RCON2170 = domestic-only).

description: Bank-level foreign-office series for FFIEC 031 filers.
notes: Standard Call Report foreign-office prefix; corroborate specific items against Fed MDRM.

description: Schedule RC-R risk-based capital for FFIEC 041/051 (domestic-only) filers.
notes: RC-R capital series; the 041/051 analog of RCFA. Corroborate specific items against Fed MDRM.

description: Schedule RC-R risk-based capital for FFIEC 031 filers.
notes: RCFA2170 appears from 2020 (Fed MDRM item 2170).

description: Income-statement items (Schedule RI / HI), reported year-to-date.
notes: Flow series; resets each calendar year.

description: Schedule RC-R advanced-approaches (Basel III) capital items.
notes: Call-report analog of BHCW; corroborate specific items against Fed MDRM.

description: 4-char MDRM mnemonic for Uniform Bank Performance Report items; full code = UBPR + 4-char item (e.g. UBPRE001).
notes: Computed/derived from Call Report data, not directly filed.

description: Item-code group within the UBPR mnemonic: codes beginning 'E' (e.g. UBPRE001 = Interest Income (TE), Summary Ratios p.1).
notes: NOT a separate 4-char MDRM mnemonic — it is the UBPR mnemonic + item codes starting 'E'. Listed for convenience.

description: Item-code group within the UBPR mnemonic: codes beginning 'M'.
notes: NOT a separate 4-char MDRM mnemonic — UBPR mnemonic + item codes starting 'M'. Listed for convenience.

description: Peer-group average/percentile statistics (UBPS#### codes).
notes: Grain: reporting_period x peer_group x code.

scope: Per-bank percentile rank within peer group
description: Per-bank percentile rank 0–99 within peer group (UBPK#### codes).
notes: Grain: reporting_period x rssd_id x peer_group x code.

description: Systemic-importance indicator line items (RISK#### codes) from FR Y-15.
notes: G-SIB scope; annual bulk data.

description: NCUA 5300 Call Report account-code family (FS220 / ACCT_* schedules) for federally insured credit unions.
notes: Non-MDRM namespace; described from NCUA AcctDesc.txt. FS220A = Credit Union Profile.

description: Savings-institution / Thrift Financial Report series (e.g. SVGL2170 = total assets).
notes: Legacy OTS Thrift Financial Report mnemonic; appears in Fed MDRM examples (SVGL2170).
